---
title: "Research"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
---

<style>

.section-cmd {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.72rem;
color: #aaa;
letter-spacing: 0.08em;
margin: 3rem 0 0;
padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e4e4;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 6px;
}
.section-cmd .ps { color: #16a34a; }

.pub-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }

.pub-item {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 72px 1fr;
gap: 0 1.25rem;
padding: 10px 0;
border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
align-items: baseline;
}
.pub-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0; }

.pub-status {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.68rem;
color: #888;
letter-spacing: 0.03em;
padding-top: 1px;
white-space: nowrap;
line-height: 1.65;
}

.pub-body {
font-size: 0.85rem;
font-weight: 300;
color: #333;
line-height: 1.65;
}

.pub-body a {
color: #111;
text-decoration: underline;
text-decoration-color: #e0e0e0;
text-underline-offset: 2px;
}
.pub-body a:hover { color: #16a34a; text-decoration-color: #16a34a; }

.pub-venue {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.67rem;
color: #777;
display: block;
margin-top: 2px;
}

.pub-award {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.65rem;
color: #16a34a;
display: block;
margin-top: 3px;
letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.pub-row {
display: flex;
align-items: center;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 5px;
margin-top: 6px;
}

.pub-tag {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.6rem;
color: #888;
border: 1px solid #ddd;
padding: 1px 6px;
border-radius: 2px;
letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}

.pub-link {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.65rem;
letter-spacing: 0.04em;
padding: 2px 10px;
border-radius: 2px;
text-decoration: none;
transition: all 0.12s;
}
.pub-link.paper { background: #111; color: #fff; }
.pub-link.paper:hover { background: #16a34a; }
.pub-link.code { border: 1px solid #16a34a; color: #16a34a; }
.pub-link.code:hover { background: #16a34a; color: #fff; }

.pub-flag {
display: inline-block;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.62rem;
color: #16a34a;
border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
padding: 1px 5px;
border-radius: 2px;
margin-right: 4px;
letter-spacing: 0.05em;
vertical-align: middle;
position: relative;
top: -1px;
}

.me { font-weight: 500; color: #111; }

</style>

My research develops and applies methods in causal inference, Bayesian statistics, and reinforcement learning to improve decision-making in health and public policy — with applications to suicide prevention, emergency department operations, and precision medicine.

---

<div class="section-cmd"><span class="ps">$</span> ls working-papers/</div>

<div class="pub-list">

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-status">revision</div>
<div class="pub-body">
<span class="pub-flag">featured</span><a href="https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=5193207" target="_blank">The Impact of Batching Advanced Imaging Tests in Emergency Departments</a>
<span class="pub-venue"><span class="me">Jameson JC</span>, Saghafian S, Huckman RS, Hodgson N, Baugh J</span>
<span class="pub-award">IOE-ISyE-MS&amp;E Rising Stars Workshop — People's Choice Award for Poster Presentation, 2026</span>
<span class="pub-award">INFORMS Health Applications Society Best Student Paper — Honorable Mention, 2025</span>
<div class="pub-row">
<span class="pub-tag">--operations</span>
<span class="pub-tag">--causal</span>
<a href="https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=5193207" class="pub-link paper" target="_blank">paper</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-status">review</div>
<div class="pub-body">
Machine Learning to Personalize Psychotherapy Selection for Patients at Elevated Suicide Risk in a Large National Cohort
<span class="pub-venue"><span class="me">Jameson JC</span>, Gibbons JB, Wood R, Ruble M, Peloquin J, Sung M, Hathaway DB, Straub L, Aldis R, Lyndon S, Wang PS</span>
<div class="pub-row">
<span class="pub-tag">--machine-learning</span>
<span class="pub-tag">--causal</span>
<span class="pub-tag">--suicide-prevention</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-status">revision</div>
<div class="pub-body">
Effectiveness of Extreme Risk Protection Orders in Reducing Firearm Deaths: A Bayesian Analysis of State-Level Implementation, 1999–2023
<span class="pub-venue"><span class="me">Jameson JC</span>, Glasser NJ, Pollack HA</span>
<div class="pub-row">
<span class="pub-tag">--bayesian</span>
<span class="pub-tag">--policy</span>
<span class="pub-tag">--causal</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>


<div class="section-cmd"><span class="ps">$</span> ls publications/ | sort -r</div>

<div class="pub-list">

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-status">2025</div>
<div class="pub-body">
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.amepre.2025.107961" target="_blank">Sex Differences in Life-Course Suicide Rates by State Firearm Policy Environment</a>
<span class="pub-venue">Glasser NJ, <span class="me">Jameson JC</span>, Abou Baker N, Pollack HA, Tung EL &nbsp;·&nbsp; American Journal of Preventive Medicine</span>
<div class="pub-row">
<span class="pub-tag">--policy</span>
<span class="pub-tag">--mens-health</span>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.amepre.2025.107961" class="pub-link paper" target="_blank">paper</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-status">2025</div>
<div class="pub-body">
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/cpt.3617" target="_blank">A National Study of Exposure to Prescription Medications with Evidence-Based Pharmacogenomic Information</a>
<span class="pub-venue">Saulsberry L, <span class="me">Jameson JC</span>, Gibbons RD, Dolan ME, Olopade OI, O'Donnell PH &nbsp;·&nbsp; Clinical Pharmacology &amp; Therapeutics</span>
<div class="pub-row">
<span class="pub-tag">--genomics</span>
<span class="pub-tag">--health-equity</span>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/cpt.3617" class="pub-link paper" target="_blank">paper</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-status">2025</div>
<div class="pub-body">
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/1475-6773.14406" target="_blank">Variation in Batch Ordering of Imaging Tests in the Emergency Department and the Impact on Care Delivery</a>
<span class="pub-venue"><span class="me">Jameson JC</span>, Saghafian S, Huckman RS, Hodgson N &nbsp;·&nbsp; Health Services Research</span>
<div class="pub-row">
<span class="pub-tag">--operations</span>
<span class="pub-tag">--causal</span>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/1475-6773.14406" class="pub-link paper" target="_blank">paper</a>
<a href="https://github.com/jacobjameson/batch-vs-sequence/" class="pub-link code" target="_blank">code</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-status">2024</div>
<div class="pub-body">
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1126/sciadv.adp4670" target="_blank">Genomic Heterogeneity and Ploidy Identify Patients with Intrinsic Resistance to PD-1 Blockade in Metastatic Melanoma</a>
<span class="pub-venue">Tarantino G, Ricker CA, ... <span class="me">Jameson JC</span>, et al. &nbsp;·&nbsp; Science Advances</span>
<div class="pub-row">
<span class="pub-tag">--genomics</span>
<span class="pub-tag">--machine-learning</span>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1126/sciadv.adp4670" class="pub-link paper" target="_blank">paper</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-status">2024</div>
<div class="pub-body">
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1001/jamanetworkopen.2024.41281" target="_blank">Male Gender Expressivity and Diagnosis and Treatment of Cardiovascular Disease Risks in Men</a>
<span class="pub-venue">Glasser NJ, <span class="me">Jameson JC</span>, Huang ES, et al. &nbsp;·&nbsp; JAMA Network Open</span>
<div class="pub-row">
<span class="pub-tag">--mens-health</span>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1001/jamanetworkopen.2024.41281" class="pub-link paper" target="_blank">paper</a>
<a href="https://github.com/jacobjameson/MGE-CVD" class="pub-link code" target="_blank">code</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-status">2024</div>
<div class="pub-body">
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jadohealth.2023.11.018" target="_blank">Adolescent School Social Networks, Gender Norms, and Changes in Male Gender Expression With Young Adult Substance Use</a>
<span class="pub-venue">Glasser NJ, <span class="me">Jameson JC</span>, Tung EL, Lindau ST, Pollack HA &nbsp;·&nbsp; Journal of Adolescent Health</span>
<div class="pub-row">
<span class="pub-tag">--networks</span>
<span class="pub-tag">--mens-health</span>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jadohealth.2023.11.018" class="pub-link paper" target="_blank">paper</a>
<a href="https://github.com/jacobjameson/MGE-and-Substance-Use" class="pub-link code" target="_blank">code</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-item">
<div class="pub-status">2023</div>
<div class="pub-body">
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1097/ACM.0000000000005195" target="_blank">Does the Doctor-Patient Relationship Affect Enrollment in Clinical Research?</a>
<span class="pub-venue">Soo J, <span class="me">Jameson J</span>, Flores A, et al., Meltzer D &nbsp;·&nbsp; Academic Medicine</span>
<div class="pub-row">
<span class="pub-tag">--health-equity</span>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1097/ACM.0000000000005195" class="pub-link paper" target="_blank">paper</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
